info.name: Anime Subscription API - Complete Endpoint Testing
info.description: Complete Postman collection for testing the Anime Subscription API. Run npm run seed and npm start before using. The collection stores tokens and IDs automatically in collection variables.

request.description: Checks that the Express server is running.

item.name: 01. Auth
item.description: Register and login endpoints. Admin and user login requests save JWT tokens automatically.

request.description: Creates a temporary user for testing admin user CRUD. The generated user ID is saved as registered_user_id.

exec: pm.test('Register response contains a message', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('message'); });

request.description: Logs in the seeded admin account and saves admin_token and admin_user_id.
Logs in the seeded normal user account and saves user_token and user_id.

item.name: 02. Load Seed Data IDs
item.description: Run this folder after login. It reads seeded data and saves reusable IDs for later requests.

item.name: Get All Anime - Save Anime IDs

request.description: Saves anime_id and premium_anime_id from seeded anime.

exec: pm.test('Anime list is an array', function () { pm.expect(json).to.be.an('array'); });
const nonPremium = json.find(a => a && a.isPremium === false) || json[0];
const premium = json.find(a => a && a.isPremium === true);

item.name: Get All Subscriptions - Save Plan ID

request.description: Saves subscription_id from seeded subscription plans. It prefers the 1 Month plan if available.

exec: pm.test('Subscription list is an array', function () { pm.expect(json).to.be.an('array'); });
const plan = json.find(p => p.plan_name && p.plan_name.toLowerCase().includes('1 month')) || json[0];

item.name: Get All Users - Save User ID

request.description: Admin-only request. Saves user_id from the normal seeded user if found.

exec: pm.test('User list is an array', function () { pm.expect(json).to.be.an('array'); });
const normalUser = json.find(u => u.email === pm.collectionVariables.get('user_email')) || json.find(u => u.role === 'user') || json[0];

item.name: 03. Anime Endpoints
item.description: Public anime endpoints, Jikan integration, admin Anime CRUD, and watch access testing.

request.description: Searches anime from the Jikan public API.
Reads all local anime.
Reads one local anime by ID.

item.name: Create Anime (Admin) - Save Created Anime ID

request.description: Creates anime as admin. coverImage is optional and disabled by default.

formdata.value: Anime created from Postman collection testing.

formdata.description: Optional: enable this field and choose an image file if you want to test upload.

exec: pm.test('Created anime has an ID', function () { pm.expect(anime._id).to.be.a('string'); });

request.description: Reads the anime created by this collection.
Updates the anime created by this collection.
Tests watch access using user token.
Tests premium watch access. Seeded user is premium after npm run seed.

item.name: 04. Subscription Plan Endpoints
item.description: Public subscription read endpoints and admin Subscription CRUD.

request.description: Reads all subscription plans.
Reads one subscription plan by ID.

item.name: Create Subscription (Admin) - Save Created Plan ID

request.description: Creates a temporary subscription plan as admin.

exec: pm.test('Created plan has an ID', function () { pm.expect(plan._id).to.be.a('string'); });

request.description: Reads the created subscription plan.
Updates the temporary subscription plan.

item.name: 05. Transaction Endpoints
item.description: User purchase, user transaction history, and admin Transaction CRUD endpoints.

item.name: Purchase Premium with Wallet (User) - Save Transaction ID

request.description: Purchases a seeded subscription plan using the seeded user wallet. Saves transaction ID.
Reads transaction history for the logged-in user.
Admin-only endpoint to read all transaction records.

exec: pm.test('Transaction list is an array', function () { pm.expect(json).to.be.an('array'); });

request.description: Admin-only endpoint to update a transaction.

item.name: 06. Review Endpoints
item.description: Review CRUD. This collection reviews the anime created earlier to avoid duplicate review errors on seeded data.

request.description: Public endpoint to read reviews and rating summary by anime.
Reads current user reviews.
Creates a review for the anime created by this collection.

exec: pm.test('Review has an ID', function () { pm.expect(review._id).to.be.a('string'); });

request.description: Reads reviews for the created anime.
Updates the review created by this collection.

item.name: 07. Watchlist Endpoints
item.description: Watchlist CRUD for the logged-in user.

request.description: Reads current user watchlist.

item.name: Add Anime to Watchlist (User) - Save Watchlist ID

request.description: Adds the anime created by this collection to the current user watchlist.

exec: pm.test('Watchlist item has an ID', function () { pm.expect(item._id).to.be.a('string'); });

request.description: Confirms watchlist data after create.
Updates the status of the watchlist item created by this collection.

item.name: 08. User Endpoints (Admin)
item.description: Admin-only user management endpoints. Uses the temporary user created in Auth folder.

request.description: Reads all users without passwords.
Reads the temporary registered user.
Updates the temporary registered user.

item.name: 09. Cleanup / Delete Endpoint Tests
item.description: Run at the end to test DELETE endpoints and remove temporary data created by the collection.

request.description: Deletes the temporary review.
Deletes the temporary watchlist item.
Deletes the temporary transaction.
Deletes the temporary anime.
Deletes the temporary subscription plan.
Deletes the temporary registered user.
